description: A fun, aggressive Great League Competitors Cup team built around Acid Shadow Victreebel as the closer, with Magcargo leading to cover flyers and Kanto Ninetales and Galarian Corsola as the safe swap. Victreebel's fast, hard-hitting Acid plus Leaf Blade/Sludge Bomb pressure aims to sweep the endgame.
performanceNotes: Creator admits it's not recommended for gaining ELO but went roughly even with it
Very weak to Shadow Malamar (triple weak), which was a common lead all day
Shadow Victreebel repeatedly closed games with double-resisted Leaf Blade and monster attack pressure

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: SHADOW VICTREEBEL IS COMING FOR YOUR WATER TYPES!
